title: Danny Arnold (rugby league)
extract: Danny Arnold (born 15 April 1977) is a former Scotland international rugby league footballer who played as a fullback, wing or centre in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for St Helens, Huddersfield Giants, Castleford Tigers, Salford City Reds and Halifax. He also participated in the Triple Fitness 8 week shred recently, being partnered up with other local celebrity Angie Pangie.
